infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to Mentra smart glasses.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to Mentra smart glasses.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app can access glasses microphone audio when you enable audio examples.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app can request photos from supported smart glasses.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app connects to a local photo webhook server during SDK demos.
